channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Big 12 power rankings: Iowa State on top, West Virginia climbs (after the Kansas stunner) and Utah lands in the cellar
item.description: The Mountaineers stunned Kansas (in Lawrence) and are just behind the Cyclones in the Hotline's latest look at the Big 12 hierarchy.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Illinois holds off South Carolina in Citrus Bowl for first 10-win season since 2001
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Josh McCray scored his second touchdown of the game on a 9-yard run midway through the fourth quarter to give No. 21 Illinois the lead, and the Illini held on to beat No. 14 South Carolina, 21-17, in the Cheez-It Citrus Bowl on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses fifth straight game, 4-1 to Edmonton
item.description: EDMONTON (ABC4 Sports) - Connor McDavid and Leon Draisaitl each extended their point streaks to 12 games for the Edmonton Oilers, who won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Rogers Place on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gauff and Fritz put U.S. in United Cup tennis semis. Kazakhstan also through after ousting Germany
item.description: Coco Gauff and Taylor Fritz have powered the U.S. into the semifinals of the United Cup mixed teams tennis event.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Arizona State extends coach Kenny Dillingham 5 more years, AP source says
item.description: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham has agreed to a five-year contract extension on the eve of the Sun Devils' College Football Playoff quarterfinal game, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matthew Gaudreau's wife announces the birth of their first child months after tragic death
item.description: Four months after her husband Matthew Gaudreau and his brother Johnny Gaudreau were killed by an alleged drunk driver, Madeline Gaudreau announced the birth of their first child.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dartmouth basketball players end their unionization attempt in anticipation of shifting NLRB
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Dartmouth men’s basketball team on Tuesday dropped its attempt to unionize, abruptly ending a push to become the first college athletes to bargain for a contract in order to avoid a potentially damaging precedent from a National Labor Relations Board that soon will be controlled by
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan defense pressures Milroe all day, Wolverines beat No. 11 Alabama 19-13 in ReliaQuest Bowl
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A year removed from winning the national championship, Michigan finished its first season under Sherrone Moore with a victory setting the tone for a bright future. Moore replaced Jim Harbaugh after the former Wolverines coach left for the NFL's Los Angeles Chargers last winter.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Javon Small hits go-ahead FT with 1.8 seconds left, sending West Virginia to 62-61 win over No. 7 KU
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — Javon Small hit the go-ahead free throw with 1.8 seconds remaining, and short-handed West Virginia held on after blowing an 18-point second-half lead to beat seventh-ranked Kansas 62-61 in an intense Big 12 opener for both teams Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Oakland youth swim coach sentenced to prison for sexually abusing student
item.description: David Teel, 57, agreed to a 3-year prison term as part of a plea deal with Alameda County prosecutors.
item.dc:creator: Nate Gartrell, The Mercury News

item.title: Westbrook has 'perfect' triple-double, 0 turnovers in Nuggets' 132-121 win over Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW COLES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coby White, Torrey Craig lead the Bulls past the Hornets in overtime, 115-108
item.description: Coby White narrowly missed his first career triple-double, finishing with 23 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists, and Torrey Craig scored 18 with five 3-pointers after halftime as the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Charlotte Hornets 115-108 in overtime Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tennessee remains No. 1 following quiet week in AP Top 25, No. 15 UCLA climbs 7 spots
item.description: Tennessee remains No. 1 after a quiet holiday week in the AP Top 25. The Volunteers received 41 first-place votes from a 61-person media panel in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released Monday. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Six former Florida State players sue coach Leonard Hamilton over failed NIL payments
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Six former Florida State basketball players sued Seminoles coach Leonard Hamilton on Monday, alleging he failed to make good on a promise to get each of them $250,000 in name, image and likeness compensation. The plaintiffs — Darin Green Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs with Bowles thanks a near-perfect offensive day, and a duck, for the team's return to first place
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned to the top of the NFC South on Sunday with a dominating 48-14 win over the Carolina Panthers, paired with a loss by the Atlanta Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 2024 Holiday Bowl: Homegrown Cougars leave it all on the field in front of hometown crowd
item.description: While a depleted Washington State may not have tasted any eggnog this year in the Holiday Bowl after falling short to Syracuse 52-35, a few San Diego locals still making a memory of a lifetime playing on the big stage in front of their hometown crowd.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Thompson-Herro fight leads to ejections of multiple players and coaches in Heat's victory in Houston
item.description: Rockets forward Amen Thompson threw Heat guard Tyler Herro to the floor to trigger an altercation that resulted in six ejections in the closing minute of Miami's 104-100 victory over Houston on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Eagles clinched the division title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USU beats San Diego State on last-second shot, 67-66
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men’s basketball earned its first road win over a ranked opponent in over three decades Saturday afternoon in front of a sellout crowd at Viejas Arena, taking down No. 20 San Diego State 67-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado football fans face a dramatic week across three teams
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado football fans experienced a week filled with high-stakes action, featuring the Denver Broncos chasing a playoff berth and the Colorado Buffaloes and Colorado State Rams battling in bowl games.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Giddey's triple-double sends Bulls to 116-111 win over Bucks
item.description: Josh Giddey had 23 points, 15 rebounds and 10 assists for his second triple-double this season to lead the Chicago Bulls to a 116-111 win over the Milwaukee Bucks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Point and Kucherov lead surging Lightning to 6-2 win over reeling Rangers
item.description: Brayden Point and Nikita Kucherov each had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning past the reeling New York Rangers 6-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC
